name: Wardley Maps
what_it_is: Strategic mapping plotting value chain components by user visibility (y-axis) and evolutionary maturity (x-axis: genesis to commodity).
core_mechanic: Map all components to deliver your user need. Place on evolution axis. Identify what to commoditize vs. what to own. Spot where movement creates opportunity or threat.
when_to_use: Build vs. buy decisions / Identifying where to invest for competitive advantage / Industry dynamics shifting / Strategic bets need grounding in how the landscape evolves
when_not_to_use: Solving a user problem not a positioning problem / Not enough domain context to map accurately / Short-term decisions
ideaos_application: Agent 3 maps top 5-7 value chain components, places on evolution axis, flags components in motion, identifies the strategic bet implied by current position.
